login.title: Welcome
login.description: Sign in with your email and password.
login.oauthDescription: Sign in with one of the supported providers.
login.invalidSession: Your session is invalid or expired. Please sign in again.
login.noProviders: No sign-in providers are configured yet.

errors.default: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Choose a unique username, then use your email and password to get started.
register.nameHint: Display name shown on your profile, can be changed anytime
register.usernameHint: Unique identifier for your profile URL, only letters, numbers, underscores and periods

errors.default: Unable to create account. Please try again.
errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
errors.usernameTooLong: Username must be at most 30 characters.
errors.usernameInvalid: Username may only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and periods.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage preferences and CLI API keys.
settings.panelPreferencesDescription: Timezone, public profile visibility, and project mode.
settings.panelAccountDescription: Display name, username, and bio for your profile and @mentions.
settings.panelAuthenticationDescription: Link sign-in providers and manage connected accounts.
settings.panelCliKeysDescription: Create and manage API keys for the Token Arena CLI.

identity.title: Account identity
identity.name: Display name
identity.nameHint: Shown on your public profile and can be changed anytime.
identity.usernameHint: Used for your profile URL and @mentions. Only letters, numbers, underscores, and periods are allowed.
identity.setupNotice: Before you continue, confirm the username people can @mention. You can keep the suggested one or choose a new one.

errors.default: Unable to save your profile right now.
errors.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
errors.usernameTooLong: Username must be at most 30 characters.
errors.usernameInvalid: Username may only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and periods.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected providers
connectedAccounts.description: View which providers are already linked to this account and add another sign-in method when needed.
connectedAccounts.empty: No sign-in providers are connected yet.

errors.connect: Unable to connect this provider right now.
errors.disconnect: Unable to disconnect this provider right now.

settings.bioPlaceholder: What are you building with AI?

emptyState.title: No usage data yet
emptyState.step3: Run the command below in your CLI and paste your API key when prompted:

filters.customRangeDescription: Pick a start and end date in {timezone}.

trend.title: Daily Trend
trend.emptyCost: No priced usage in this range.

pricing.description: Review the model matches and unit prices used for estimated cost.
pricing.count: {count, plural, =0 {0 models} one {# model} other {# models}}
pricing.empty: No model usage in this range.

breakdowns.title: Breakdowns
breakdowns.description: Break down usage by device, tool, model, and project.

empty.devices: No device data in this range.
empty.tools: No tool data in this range.
empty.models: No model data in this range.
empty.projects: No project data in this range.

breakdowns.emptyCost: No priced usage in this range.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Browse usage one session at a time, newest first.
sessions.count: {count, plural, =0 {0 sessions} one {# session} other {# sessions}}
sessions.empty: No session data in this range.

keys.copyShownOnce: Copy it now. It will only be shown once.
keys.copyFailed: Unable to copy the key automatically. Please copy it manually.

dialog.createDescription: Give this key a name so you can remember which device or workflow uses it.
dialog.renameDescription: Update the label shown in the dashboard and settings pages.
dialog.name: Name

share.title: Generate share card
share.description: Turn the current dashboard view into a 4:3 image you can download or copy.
share.sourceDescription: The share card always reflects the range and filters you already picked on the Usage page.
share.footerHint: Tip: copy the caption first, then drop the image into any social app.
share.copyImageUnsupported: Copying images is not supported in this browser.

status.failed: Couldn’t generate the share card. Please try again.

summary.label: Report card
summary.description: Lead with tokens, trend, and your usage mix.

persona.label: Persona card
persona.description: Lead with your AI coding style and strongest pattern.

hideProject.title: Hide project names
hideProject.description: Replace the top project with a neutral private label.

hideCost.title: Hide cost
hideCost.description: Keep the dollars private while still sharing the rest of the card.

hideUsername.title: Anonymous mode
hideUsername.description: Replace your username with Anonymous Builder.

card.currentView: Based on your current dashboard view

captions.persona: {user}'s AI Coding Persona is “{persona}”. {insight} Built with Token Arena.

reasoning_master.title: Reasoning Beast
reasoning_master.description: A serious share of your workload goes into thinking before the answer lands.

cache_guardian.title: Cache Guardian
cache_guardian.description: You reuse context well and squeeze more value out of repeated flows.

project_deep_diver.title: Project Deep Diver
project_deep_diver.description: You lock into one project and push it hard instead of context switching.

model_orchestrator.title: Model Orchestrator
model_orchestrator.description: You move across multiple models and know when each one should take the lead.

rapid_shipper.title: Rapid Shipper
rapid_shipper.description: You stack many focused sessions and keep the momentum high.

steady_builder.title: Steady Builder
steady_builder.description: You keep a calm, durable pace and compound progress over time.

insights.reasoningShare: {value} of your tokens went into reasoning
insights.cacheShare: {value} of your usage came from cache hits
insights.projectFocus: {value} of your usage stayed inside one project
insights.sessionCount: You opened {count} sessions in this view

profile.privateBannerDescription: Enable Public profile in Settings on the dashboard to let other people discover this page.

network.emptyFollowing: You are not following anyone yet.

errors.followFailed: Unable to update the follow state.
errors.tagFailed: Unable to update the follow tag.

leaderboard.emptyGlobal: No public usage has been synced yet.
leaderboard.emptyFollowing: No one in your network has leaderboard activity in this window yet.
leaderboard.privateNoticeTitle: Your profile is hidden from the global leaderboard
leaderboard.privateNoticeDescription: Click the button on the right or enable Public profile in Settings on the dashboard if you want your usage to appear in the public rankings.
leaderboard.signInTitle: Sign in for a network leaderboard
leaderboard.signInDescription: Your following leaderboard is personalized and only appears after you sign in.
leaderboard.emptyFollowingFiltered: No one in the {tag} tag has leaderboard activity in this window yet.
